name: OpenHands CLI
description: Install the OpenHands CLI from PyPI via pipx (uses package openhands with Python 3.12).

version.description: Version of openhands to install. Use 'latest' to track the newest release.

provider.description: Optional provider prefix for model names that do not already include one (for example, 'litellm').

api_key.description: Optional LLM API key for ~/.openhands/agent_settings.json (can use ${localEnv:FIREWORKS_API_KEY}).
